attributes.title: [Couchbase] SRE Cluster overview
attributes.description: Cluster health, query service, node utilization, bucket throughput, and XDCR backlog in one operational view.

params.markdown:
## [Couchbase] SRE Cluster overview

Operational health across the Couchbase data plane and related services:
- Cluster memory and disk utilization (percent used)
- N1QL query latency and request rate
- Per-node CPU and memory stress
- Bucket operation rates (KV traffic)
- XDCR replication backlog and node inventory

query.esql:
FROM logs-couchbase.node-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.node"
| STATS nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(couchbase.node.hostname)

FROM logs-couchbase.node-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.node"
| STATS nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(couchbase.node.hostname)

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| EVAL ram_pct = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.used.value.bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.total.bytes)
| STATS avg_cluster_ram_pct = AVG(ram_pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| EVAL ram_pct = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.used.value.bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.total.bytes)
| STATS avg_cluster_ram_pct = AVG(ram_pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| EVAL hdd_pct = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.hdd.used.value.bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.hdd.total.bytes)
| STATS avg_cluster_hdd_pct = AVG(hdd_pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| EVAL hdd_pct = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.hdd.used.value.bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.hdd.total.bytes)
| STATS avg_cluster_hdd_pct = AVG(hdd_pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.query_index-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.query_index"
| STATS avg_query_latency = AVG(couchbase.query_index.query.request_time.avg)

FROM metrics-couchbase.query_index-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.query_index"
| STATS avg_query_latency = AVG(couchbase.query_index.query.request_time.avg)

FROM metrics-couchbase.query_index-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.query_index"
| STATS avg_qps = AVG(couchbase.query_index.query.requests)

FROM metrics-couchbase.query_index-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.query_index"
| STATS avg_qps = AVG(couchbase.query_index.query.requests)

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS xdcr_backlog = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.items.remaining)

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS xdcr_backlog = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.items.remaining)

FROM metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.bucket"
| STATS peak_bucket_ram_pct = MAX(couchbase.bucket.ram.quota.used.pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.bucket"
| STATS peak_bucket_ram_pct = MAX(couchbase.bucket.ram.quota.used.pct)

FROM logs-couchbase.node-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.node"
| STATS avg_node_cpu = AVG(`couchbase.node.cpu_utilization_rate.pct`)

FROM logs-couchbase.node-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.node"
| STATS avg_node_cpu = AVG(`couchbase.node.cpu_utilization_rate.pct`)

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| EVAL ram_pct = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.used.value.bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.total.bytes)
| EVAL hdd_pct = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.hdd.used.value.bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.hdd.total.bytes)
| STATS avg_ram = AVG(ram_pct), avg_hdd = AVG(hdd_pct) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| EVAL ram_pct = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.used.value.bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.total.bytes)
| EVAL hdd_pct = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.hdd.used.value.bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.hdd.total.bytes)
| STATS avg_ram = AVG(ram_pct), avg_hdd = AVG(hdd_pct) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.query_index-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.query_index"
| STATS avg_lat = AVG(couchbase.query_index.query.request_time.avg), avg_req = AVG(couchbase.query_index.query.requests) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.query_index-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.query_index"
| STATS avg_lat = AVG(couchbase.query_index.query.request_time.avg), avg_req = AVG(couchbase.query_index.query.requests) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-couchbase.node-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.node"
| STATS avg_cpu = AVG(`couchbase.node.cpu_utilization_rate.pct`) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.node.hostname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-couchbase.node-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.node"
| STATS avg_cpu = AVG(`couchbase.node.cpu_utilization_rate.pct`) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.node.hostname
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.bucket"
| STATS ops = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchbase.bucket.operations_per_sec)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.bucket.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.bucket"
| STATS ops = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchbase.bucket.operations_per_sec)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.bucket.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS sent = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.items.sent), remaining = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.items.remaining) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.xdcr-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.xdcr"
| STATS sent = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.items.sent), remaining = AVG(couchbase.xdcr.items.remaining) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-couchbase.node-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.node"
| EVAL mem_pct = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.node.memory.used.bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.node.memory.total.bytes)
| STATS avg_cpu = AVG(`couchbase.node.cpu_utilization_rate.pct`), avg_mem_pct = AVG(mem_pct), peak_swap_used = MAX(couchbase.node.swap.used.bytes), avg_ops = AVG(couchbase.node.operations.count) BY node = couchbase.node.hostname
| SORT avg_cpu DESC
| LIMIT 50

FROM logs-couchbase.node-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.node"
| EVAL mem_pct = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.node.memory.used.bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.node.memory.total.bytes)
| STATS avg_cpu = AVG(`couchbase.node.cpu_utilization_rate.pct`), avg_mem_pct = AVG(mem_pct), peak_swap_used = MAX(couchbase.node.swap.used.bytes), avg_ops = AVG(couchbase.node.operations.count) BY node = couchbase.node.hostname
| SORT avg_cpu DESC
| LIMIT 50
